summary: Phase 8 comprehensive testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed. All 10 frontend features verified: Shipping column in All Orders, Duplicate Order/PI buttons, Copy phone/address buttons, Additional Charges system, min=0 on Rate/Amount, Admin-only customer delete with two-step confirmation, Editable shipping method in Dispatch, Camera buttons for uploads.
critical_code_review_comments: Customer delete properly restricted to admin role at both frontend and backend
Two-step delete confirmation working with step 1 and step 2 dialogs
Duplicate Order/PI endpoints return correct data structure including additional_charges
Shipping method update endpoint working for admin/dispatch/packaging roles
Additional charges system with dynamic entries, GST calculation working
min=0 attribute on Rate/Amount inputs prevents negative values
Camera buttons added alongside Gallery/Files for mobile upload support
seed_data_creation: Created telecaller1 and dispatch1 users during testing if not present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 fully tested. Key features verified: (1) All Orders page shows Shipping column with correct values (courier name, transporter name, or method name) - WORKING. (2) Order Detail page has copyable Phone, Billing Address, Shipping Address with copy icons and toast feedback - WORKING. (3) Duplicate button on Order Detail for admin/telecaller roles - WORKING. (4) Create Order Rate/Amount fields have min=0 preventing negative input - WORKING. (5) Additional Charges section with Add Charge button, Name/Amount/GST% fields - WORKING. (6) Customers page Delete button only visible for Admin role - WORKING. (7) Two-step delete confirmation dialog (step 1 warning, step 2 final warning) - WORKING. (8) Dispatch dashboard has editable shipping method dropdown with all options - WORKING. (9) Edit Order page has Camera buttons alongside Gallery/Files for payment screenshots - WORKING. (10) PI Builder has Duplicate button in list and Additional Charges section - WORKING. (11) Backend POST /api/orders/{id}/duplicate returns order data - WORKING. (12) Backend POST /api/proforma-invoices/{id}/duplicate returns PI data - WORKING. (13) Backend PUT /api/orders/{id}/shipping-method updates shipping - WORKING. (14) Backend DELETE /api/customers/{id} returns 403 for non-admin - WORKING.
